summary: Iteration 169: Description field feature testing complete. All backend and frontend tests pass. The 'description' field (message pour les participants) is correctly implemented: (1) stored in DB via POST /api/appointments, (2) optional field - backward compatible, (3) modifiable via PATCH, (4) included in prefill response, (5) displayed in wizard with character counter, (6) shown in review step, (7) displayed in appointment detail page when present.

backend.test_create_appointment_with_description: PASS - POST /api/appointments with description field stores correctly in DB
backend.test_create_appointment_without_descript: PASS - POST /api/appointments without description works (backward compatible)
backend.test_prefill_includes_description: PASS - GET /api/external-events/{id}/prefill includes description in response
backend.test_description_max_length_validation: PASS - Description > 2000 chars returns 422 validation error

frontend.wizard_description_textarea: PASS - Textarea with data-testid='appointment-description-input' exists in step 2
frontend.wizard_description_label: PASS - Label 'Message pour les participants' displayed
frontend.wizard_character_counter: PASS - Character counter 'X / 2000' displayed below textarea
frontend.wizard_placeholder: PASS - Placeholder 'Informations utiles, consignes, contexte...' displayed
frontend.review_step_description: PASS - Description appears in review step when filled
frontend.detail_page_conditional_display: PASS - Description block only shown when appointment.description is truthy

critical_code_review_comments: schemas.py L155: description: Optional[str] = Field(default=None, max_length=2000) - correctly defined as optional with max length
appointments.py L514: appointment_doc includes 'description': appointment.description or '' - correctly stored
external_events_service.py L355: prefill includes 'description': event.get('description', '') - correctly returned
AppointmentWizard.js L70: formData.description initialized, L108: prefill sets description, L611-622: textarea with counter
AppointmentHeader.js L77-82: Conditional display of description with data-testid='appointment-description'
seed_data_creation: Test appointments created and cleaned up during backend tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Description field feature fully implemented and tested. Key points: (1) Backend schema has description: Optional[str] with max_length=2000, (2) POST/PATCH endpoints handle description correctly, (3) Prefill endpoint returns description from external events, (4) Frontend wizard has textarea in step 2 with character counter, (5) Review step shows description if filled, (6) Detail page (AppointmentHeader.js) conditionally displays description block with data-testid='appointment-description'. Calendar sync (Google/Outlook) already wired in adapters - not tested in isolation as per instructions.
